import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react' import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' import { useDispatch, useSelector} from 'react-redux' import { } from '../slices/cart/cartSlice' import CheckoutSteps from '../components/CheckoutSteps' import './PlaceOrderScreen.css' function PlaceOrderScreen() { const cart = useSelector(state => state.cart) const userLogin = useSelector(state => state.userLogin) const { userInfo } = userLogin return (

Contact information:
Email: {userInfo.email}

Shipping address:
Address: {cart.shippingAddress.address}
City: {cart.shippingAddress.city}
Postal Code: {cart.shippingAddress.postalCode}
Country: {cart.shippingAddress.country}

Return to cart

Subtotal: {}lei

Shipping: {}lei

Total: {order.total}lei

) } export default PlaceOrderScreen
